title: idea: an app that builds intuition for mental numeric estimates

cards.title: Can we build an app to quickly build intuition for numeric estimates?
cards.content:
e.g.:

- estimating poker outcomes
- field-specific estimates, such  as "is this wattage draw appropriate" or "is this network delay acceptable"
- long division

ages ago, I built an [app to build intuition for currency conversion](https://currency.koljasam.com/) (as in: you are abroad and need to know if a price in not-your-native-currency is good, OK or bad).

![screenshot of app where user has to mentally convert a dollar amount into euro](../media/img/idea-an-app-that-builds-intuition-for-estimates/cc.webp)
